explanation: The requirement "The system shall measure and display the volume of gas delivered to the patient per breathing cycle" specifies that the actions of measuring and displaying tidal volume (represented by measureTV and displayTV) must occur during each breathing cycle. This is captured by setting a temporal scope "After bool_exp1 until bool_exp2", where bool_exp1 is breathingCycleStart and bool_exp2 is breathingCycleDone. Within this scope, the property measureTV & displayTV must "eventually hold", meaning it must occur at least once before the breathing cycle concludes.
